message:
feat(raptorq): add GaussianSolver and extended decoder proof capture

GaussianSolver (linalg.rs):
- Full Gaussian elimination solver over GF(256)
- Deterministic: same input always produces same output
- Buffer-reusing: in-place matrix modification, minimal allocations
- Markowitz pivoting heuristic for sparse matrices
- GaussianResult enum: Solved(Vec<DenseRow>) | Singular { row }
- GaussianStats tracking: swaps, scale_adds, pivot_selections

API:
- new(rows, cols) constructor
- set_row(row, coefficients, rhs) for building system
- solve() -> GaussianResult

Decoder proof extension (decoder.rs):
- Extended decode_with_proof() to capture additional elimination trace
- Integration with GaussianSolver for deterministic solve paths
- Proof artifacts now include full elimination history

The GaussianSolver provides a self-contained, deterministic linear
algebra kernel that can be verified against reference implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
